review_title: The best and cost effective mobile app testing platform
description: Testing against a huge pool of devices is a very great advantage. The logs is provided in the display itself also you could download the logs for the entire session.
author: Ajay Kumar M.
pros: I like the simple and crisp UI and UX of the pCloudy. The have a very large pool of devices and have a very effective access to the devices. Also, they are very keen in updating the newly launched devices to their list in a very short span of time.
cons: There is nothing that I could say as cons. The listing and categorisation of the devices could have been made better. hope this will be fixed in the upcoming releases.

review_title: All in one Mobile Automation Tool
description: Able to perform parallel execution of test scripts on multiple devices of both Android and IOS at the same time. Definitely a better option over emulators
author: Aneesh P.
pros: pCloudy is a Great tool that one can execute the same test scripts on both Android and IOS Devices. With the Easy Integration with selenium, and good support for any kind of problems makes it a preferred choice A better option over emulators due to the option of test execution on different versions of android and IOS Devices
cons: At the time of low bandwidth speeds, Live view of 2 or more devices makes the test execution a little more delayed. Takes a little longer to connect to devices and get live view during low bandwidths

description: Horrible, After purchasing I tried it out, the computer was not working, keyboard was malfunctioning and the promised computer options that i could select from were not available to me. I tried canceling but they said that they wont refund me because i bought the monthly subscription for which i paid more then anual.
author: niklavs K.
pros: they have a chatgpt feature that provides 0 value.
cons: extremely slow support, the product itself is not working and responds very slow, not good for testing apps.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Shravya G.
pros: I have been using pcloudy for more than 2 years for mobile app testing and web browser testing. pCloudy provides a range of mobile devices from very old versions to the latest versions. So it is a good choice if we want to cover a wide range of testing. It is very easy to use, and we also provides good options like taking screenshots, ability to debug and identify issues, view logs. The customer support team is also great who can quickly guide you through issues.
cons: Our application relies on video call,and there is no support of webcams on the web browsers. As a result the core feature of our project cannot be tested on pCloudy web browsers.

author: Raymond C.
pros: pCloud team had differentiated themselves to be a reliable and unique cloud storage solution option, despite the more common name in the market like google drive and dropbox. As a user, I really can see the values which pCould bring to the market including convenient and easy customizable offline access for files/folder for mobile. Zero knowledge highly secured crypto folder and this far provide a reliable sync without problem! Bravo!
cons: The storage space options are fixed without the possible of step upgrade. No speed control for the built in video player.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It help us to test the Mobile Application in different Os and Different screen size, and it is showing much memory is taking and ram usage , so that we can optimize out application based on the result
cons: 1 increase the interval time while we are doing regression testing 2 Give play store email id for all the devices( while we are testing we are giving) 3 Remove automatic phone Lock

review_title: very good range of device supported
description: easy to test mobile app accross multiple devices and OSes.
author: Srinivas R.
pros: number of device supported , pricing is also reasonable . Although we didnt use automation feature but that also seems pretty matured
cons: iOS devices are a bit slow . Pricing needs to have an option where we can buy few device hours and use it forever , this becomes handy post app release and between new versions. Currently fixed monthly payout becomes a bit of an issue for startups.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Able to test in various devices simultaneously. Reduced our time for searching various devices.

pros: It help us to test the Mobile Application in different Os and Different screen size, and it is showing much memory is taking and ram usage , so that we can optimize out application based on the result

author: Mila A.
pros: pCoudy has a huge phones variety, multiple carriers India, US, easy access to phone settings and logs
cons: Previously service didn't have an intuitive interface or easy settings access, now it's all there and easy to use

review_title: Put your files in the cloud and access them everywhere!
author: Maria B.
pros: - An easy​ and user-friendly app that allows to backup the personal and work files in a unique on-line location that you can access everywhere.
cons: - Competitive are and limited free storage

review_title: Its being very helpful for testing the mobile applications.
description: without affording for physical testing devices(android/iOS) , I can test on all devices with this pCloudy
author: Vasudha K.
pros: Its device matrix coverage for android and iOS devices. Its network coverage and simulation for 2G/3G/4G/ Wifi Its very good for automating my application as well
cons: Its untimely disconnections and taking long time to reconnect It logs out sometimes unnecessarily.

review_title: Great experience, very helpful , Professional, cost effective, friendly, approach friendly,happy
author: sindhura R.
pros: User friendly , stable, interactive, we could test on cloud device very easily, we had feel of real device.
cons: No cons, we were happy testing on cloud device, we could test even on the device that is located in USA and other countris
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Able to test in various devices simultaneously. Reduced our time for searching various devices.
author: Devika K.
pros: Through the devices in pCloudy we are able to test our application on various platforms and various devices. pCloudy platform is very easy to use.
cons: Sometimes connecting to the device is taking too much time and sometimes screenshot feature also not working.

review_title: Automation is made very easy as if I'm developing with my local resources
author: Santhoshkumar S.
pros: 1. Cost effective 2. APIs to automate almost everything in Android 3. Support to run ADB commands on Android devices, while other device cloud providers don't.
cons: 1. Web portal is slow sometimes which may be a concern for manual testers. (As I'm doing automation, this is ignorable)
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I was able to test my app on multiple devices and got useful debugging information.
author: Daniel D.
pros: I was experiencing a bug on some devices I don't have access to. I had already tried some online testing services to no avail, but with pCloudy I created a new account and within minutes I was able to run a test and download a log file with valuable debug information for the device I needed! It's great that they have so many devices available.
cons: At first I had a little trouble understanding how devices on different countries worked and how uploaded apps would work on them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
